ref: "Jika mereka tidak melakukannya dengan betul, mereka akan memarakkan api," kata Iinuma.

src: According to Iinuma, ground crews are continuing to maintain the fire's perimeter, which remained unchanged from Tuesday.
ref: Menurut Iinuma, krew tanah berterusan untuk mengekalkan perimeter api, yang tidak berubah sejak hari Selasa.

src: The helicopters are being used to fight the fires where ground crews can't reach, such as steep mountain passes and valleys.
ref: Helikopter digunakan untuk melawan kebakaran di kawasan yang tidak dapat dicapai krew tanah, seperti laluan gunung curam dan lembah.

src: Iinuma also expressed concern about a red flag advisory the National Weather service put out for all leeward areas of the Hawaiian Islands, meaning conditions are ripe for fires.
ref: Iinuma juga melahirkan kebimbangan mengenai nasihat bendera merah yang diletak oleh perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan untuk semua kawasan bawah angin di Kepulauan Hawaii, bermakna ia adalah keadaan yang mudah terbakar.

src: Lieutenant Governor James "Duke" Aiona, who took an aerial survey of Molokai's brush fire area, said it was "no immediate threat".
ref: Leftenan Gabenor James "Duke" Aiona, yang membuat kajian aerial di kawasan belukar berapi di Molokai, berkata ia "tiada ancaman segera."

src: He also noted that the fire seemed to come right up to the perimeter of some properties, but almost always stopped there.
ref: Beliau juga menyatakan bahawa api itu seolah-olah datang sehingga ke perimeter beberapa aset, tetapi selalunya berhenti di sana.

src: Aiona's observations are mirrored by a local business owners' story.
ref: Pemerhatian Aiona ini adalah sama dengan cerita dari pemilik perniagaan tempatan.

src: The wildfires destroyed the beehives of Molokai Meli, a family-owned honey business in Kapaakea, but residents admit that the beehives were not their main concern.
ref: Kebakaran hutan memusnahkan sarang lebah Molokai Meli, perniagaan madu milik keluarga di Kapaakea, tetapi penduduk mengakui bahawa sarang lebah bukan kebimbangan utama mereka.

src: "We were just beating the edges with wet towels and sheets to try and keep it from getting to the houses that are just right over that ridge," said co-owner Brenda Kaneshiro.
ref: "Kami hanya memukul setiap sudut dengan tuala basah dan kain untuk mencuba dan memastikan ia daripada merebak ke rumah-rumah yang berdekatan rabung itu," kata pemilik bersama Brenda Kaneshiro.

src: "All that metal right there, that's where they all were, there were 33 of them," said Elijah Kaneshiro, the owner's son.
ref: "Semua logam yang di sana, itulah tempat mereka pernah berada, terdapat 33 kesemuanya," kata Elia Kaneshiro, anak pemilik.

src: Australia has defeated New Zealand by 44 runs in the one off Twenty20 international match at Eden Park.
ref: Australia telah menewaskan New Zealand dengan 44 larian di dalam perlawanan antarabangsa sekali beri Twenty20 di Eden Park.

src: This victory, in the first full international Twenty20 match, gave Australia a unique treble having won the first ever test match and then the first ever limited overs international.
ref: Kemenangan ini, di dalam perlawanan penuh antarabangsa pertama Twenty20, telah memberi Australia trebel unik dengan memenangi perlawanan cubaan yang paling pertama dan kemudian perlawanan antarabangsa satu hari yang paling pertama juga.

src: Batting first, Australia set a total of 214, with Australian captain Ricky Ponting top scoring with 98 runs from 55 balls, including 8 fours and 5 sixes.
ref: Memula pukulan dahulu, Australia meletakkan set berjumlah 214, dengan kapten Australia Ricky Ponting mendapat mata tertinggi dengan 98 larian dari 55 bola, termasuk 8 fours dan 5 sixes.

src: New Zealand's Kyle Mills led the bowling attack with 3 for 44.
ref: Kyle Mills dari New Zealand mendahului serangan balingan dengan 3 untuk 44.

src: Scott Styris top scored for New Zealand with 66 runs from 39 balls.
ref: Scott Styris mendapat mata tertinggi bagi New Zealand dengan 66 larian dari 39 bola.

src: Australian paceman Michael Kasprowicz finished the match with figures of 4 for 29 from his 4 overs.
ref: Pembaling laju Australia Michael Kasprowicz menamatkan perlawanan dengan angka 4 untuk 29 daripada 4 overs.

src: The New Zealand team had dressed in the 1980s beige uniform for the occasion.
ref: Pasukan New Zealand telah memakai uniform berwarna kuning air dari tahun 1980-an untuk upacara tersebut.

src: Many had also grown facial hair suiting the 1980s for the match.
ref: Ramai juga telah membiarkan bulu roma muka tumbuh bersesuaian dengan 1980-an untuk perlawanan itu.

src: The teams now go on to play a one-day series followed by a test match series.
ref: Semua pasukan sekarang akan bersambung untuk bermain siri satu hari diikuti dengan siri perlawanan percubaan.

src: Robert Mugabe, the Zimbabwean president who has recently been widely criticized by world leaders, has claimed the current results show that he will have a 'sweeping victory' in the unopposed presidential run-off elections.
ref: Robert Mugabe, Presiden Zimbabwe yang baru-baru ini telah dikritik hebat oleh para pemimpin dunia, telah menyatakan keputusan semasa menunjukkan bahawa dia akan mempunyai 'kemenangan menyeluruh'tanpa bertanding dalam pilihan raya presiden yang dijalankan secara dua pusingan.

src: Mugabe announced his victory on one of the state run television networks.
ref: Mugabe mengumumkan kemenangannya pada salah satu rangkaian televisyen milik kerajaan.

src: "The returns show that we are winning convincingly, that we have won in all the 26 constituencies in Harare, an MDC stronghold where we won in only one constituency in March," he said.
ref: "Keputusan menunjukkan bahawa kami menang dengan kukuh, yang mana kami menang di semua 26 kawasan pilihanraya di Harare, sebuah kubu kuat MDC di mana kita hanya menang dalam satu bahagian pada pilihan raya bulan Mac," katanya.

src: Robert Mugabe was recently under a large amount of pressure to postpone the election after the main opposition candidate, Morgan Tsvangirai, pulled out due to fears of violence.
ref: Robert Mugabe baru-baru ini berada di bawah tekanan hebat untuk menangguhkan pilihanraya selepas calon pembangkang utama, Morgan Tsvangirai, menarik diri disebabkan oleh kebimbangan keganasan.

src: For example, Ban Ki-moon, secretary general of the United Nations yesterday called for the election to be postponed.
ref: Sebagai contoh, Ban Ki-moon, Setiausaha Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu semalam meminta untuk pilihanraya tersebut ditangguhkan.

src: He said that he "strongly supports the statement of the Chairman of SADC (Southern African Development Community) that conditions do not exist for a run-off election to be held at this time and that they should be postponed."
ref: Beliau mengatakan beliau "menyokong penuh kenyataan Pengerusi SADC (Komuniti Pembangunan Afrika Selatan) yang keadaan sebegitu tidak wujud untuk pilihan raya secara dua pusingan dijalankan pada masa ini dan ia seharusnya ditangguhkan."

src: Scotland has refused bail to the Libyan man convicted of the bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 despite his terminal cancer, as he can receive treatment in prison.
ref: Scotland menolak ikat jamin kepada lelaki warga Libya yang disabitkan dengan mengebom Pesawat Pan Am 103 walaupun ada kanser terminal, akan menerima rawatan di penjara.

src: Abdelbaset Ali Mohmed Al-Megrahi was jailed in 2001 for the 1988 bombing of the transatlantic airliner, killing 270 people, but is seeking to have his conviction overturned.
ref: Abdelbaset Ali Mohmed Al-Megrahi telah dipenjarakan pada 2001 kerana pengeboman pesawat transatlantik 1988, membunuh 270 orang, tetapi ingin membatalkan sabitannya.

src: Minutes after Edinburgh's Appeals Court rejected bail on compassionate grounds Jim Swire, spokesman for the victim's families who lost his daughter in the disaster, complained about the ruling.
ref: Beberapa minit selepas Mahkamah Rayuan Edinburgh menolak ikat jaminan atas dasar belas kasihan Jim Swire, jurucakap kepada keluarga mangsa yang kehilangan anaknya dalm nahas itu, mengadu tentang keputusan.

src: "It has never been a goal of our group to seek revenge," said a lawyer outside the court reading from his statement.
ref: "Ia tidak pernah menjadi gol kepada kumpulan ini untuk membalas dendam," kata peguam di luar mahkamah membaca dari kenyataannya.

src: "The refusal of a return to his family for a dying man whose verdict is not even yet secure looks uncomfortably like either an aspect of revenge -- or perhaps timidity."
ref: "Penolakan terhadap kepulangannya kepada keluarga untuk orang yang sedang tenat terlihat seperti belum lagi selamat dan dilihat tidak selesa seperti aspek membalas dendam -- atau mungkin penakut."

src: Al-Megrahi, a former intelligence officer, is 54 and serving a minimum of 27 years for the bombing.
ref: Al-Megrahi, bekas pegawai perisikan, berumur 54 tahun dan telah berkhidmat selamasa 27 tahun sebelum kes bom itu.

src: He has advanced prostate cancer which is spreading through his body.
ref: Dia mempunyai kanser prostat yang tersebar di seluruh badannya.

src: His request for bail was rejected by Lord Hamilton, Scotland's head judge, who said that as doctors say he could live a few more years he should not be released unless and until after his appeal succeeds or his condition worsens.
ref: Permohonan untuk mengikat jamin telah ditolak oleh Lord Hamilton, ketua hakim Scotland, yang berkata bahawa seperti kata doktor dia hanya boleh hidup beberapa tahun sahaja lagi melainkan dia betul-betul bertaubat atau keadaannya semakin bururk.

src: Some other doctors give his time as just months, as the cancer has reached his bones.
ref: Sesetengah doktor memberi masa selama beberapa bulan, kerana kanser itu telah sampai ke tulang.

src: Hamilton however said that palliative hormone treatment could prolong his life.
ref: Hamilton bagaimanapun berkata bahawa rawatan palliatif hormon mungkin memanjangkan hidupnya.

src: Hamilton also said Al-Megrahi was not suffering "material pain or disability".
ref: Hamilton juga berkata bahawa Al-Megrahi tidak menderita "kesakitan dan kelumpuhan."

src: The Scottish Criminal Cases Review Commission ruled last year that the conviction may be a miscarriage of justice.
ref: Suruhanjaya Semakan Kes Jenayah Scotland yang digariskan tahun lepas mungkin melaksanakan keadilan.

src: It said there was significant doubts to be raised over several key pieces of evidence in the original trial.
ref: Dikatakan ada sedikit keraguan untuk membangkitkan beberapa bukti di perbicaraan asal.

src: In the hills of Weiswampach, Luxembourg yesterday, the 12th International Wämper Triathlon became the setting for the national championship Olympic distance (1,5 km swimming, 40 km cycling, 10 km running) triathlon for both Belgium and Luxembourg.
ref: Di bukit Weiswampach, Luxembourg semalam, Triathlon Antarabangsa Wämper ke-12 menjadi penetapan triathlon berjarak kejohanan kebangsaan Olimpik (1.5 km berenang, berbasikal 40 km, 10 km berjalan) untuk kedua-dua Belgium dan Luxembourg.

src: The Belgian championship was scheduled to take place in Vilvoorde, Belgium, but because the concentration of Salmonella bacteria in the water was too high, the Belgians moved to Luxembourg.
ref: Kejohanan Belgium telah dijadualkan berlangsung di Vilvoorde, Belgium, tetapi kerana kepekatan bakteria Salmonella dalam air terlalu tinggi, kejohanan Belgium berpindah ke Luxembourg.

src: On Saturday, an event for children and for the handicapped took place, along with the 10 kilometre running event.
ref: Pada hari Sabtu, acara untuk kanak-kanak dan untuk orang kurang upaya berlangsung, bersama-sama dengan acara berjalan 10 kilometer.

src: On Sunday, the Juniors and the athletes for the Promotion race started the day, followed at 15:00 by the elite athletes.
ref: Pada hari Ahad, Juniors dan atlet untuk perlumbaan Promosi memulakan hari itu, diikuti pada jam 15:00 oleh atlet elit.

src: Even though dark clouds hung over Weiswampach most of the afternoon, there was only a short rain shower during the cycling course.
ref: Walaupun awan gelap meliputi Weiswampach kebanyakan waktu sebelah petang, hanya ada sedikit hujan panas semasa perlumbaan basikal.

src: In the men's race, Peter Croes (Belgium, Atriac team) and Dirk Bockel (Luxembourg, Celtic Diekirck team) started together for the final 10 kilometre run, but Bockel managed to outrun Croes by 23 seconds, prolonging his victory of last year.
ref: Dalam perlumbaan lelaki, Peter Croes (Belgium, pasukan Atriac) dan Dirk Bockel (Luxembourg, pasukan Celtic Diekirck) bermula bersama-sama untuk perlawanan akhir lumba lari 10 kilometer, tetapi Bockel berjaya mengalahkan Croes sebanyak 23 saat, memanjangkan kemenangannya tahun lepas.

src: Last year's winner, Stijn Goris from Belgium (LTTL team), came in third, followed closely by Bas Diederen from the Netherlands.
ref: Pemenang tahun lalu, Stijn Goris dari Belgium (pasukan LTTL), di tempat ketiga, diikuti dengan Bas Diederen dari Belanda.

src: In the women's race, the top two athletes remained the same as last year; Elisabeth "Liz" May from Luxembourg managed to stay ahead of a pursuing group the entire race, and finished first ahead of Jessica Mayon.
ref: Dalam perlumbaan wanita, kedua-dua atlet kekal seperti tahun lepas; Elisabeth "Liz" May dari Luxembourg berjaya mendahului kumpulan pelumba yang mengejar di belakang dalam keseluruhan perlumbaan, dan menduduki tempat pertama di hadapan Jessica Mayon.

src: Mayon secured the title of Belgian 1/4 Triathlon champion, in addition to the previously won Sprint Triathlon and Long Distance championships.
ref: Mayon mendapat gelaran juara Triathlon 1/4 Belgium, tambahan kepada kejohanan Sprint Triathlon dan Jarak Panjang yang dimenangi sebelum ini.

src: British MPs on the Commons Environmental Audit Committee warn Britain could face widespread electrical blackouts if new generating capacity is not added soon.
ref: Ahli Parlimen British dalam Jawatankuasa Audit Alam Sekitar Dewan Rakyat memberi amaran bahawa Britain mungkin menghadapi bekalan elektrik terputus yang meluas jika kapasiti penjanaan baru tidak ditambah tidak lama lagi.

src: Clean and renewable generating methods will be preferred in the Government's energy review, including a return to nuclear power generation.
ref: Kaedah penjanaan bersih dan boleh diperbaharui akan diutamakan dalam kajian tenaga Kerajaan, termasuk kembali ke penjanaan kuasa nuklear.

src: But the committee warned that no new nuclear power plants are expected to come online until at least 2017 with the proposed network not reaching full capacity until as late as 2030.
ref: Tetapi jawatankuasa itu memberi amaran bahawa tiada loji kuasa nuklear baru dijangka berfungsi dalam talian sehingga sekurang-kurangnya tahun 2017 dengan rangkaian yang dicadangkan itu tidak mencapai kapasiti penuh sehingga selewat 2030.

src: Meanwhile nearly a quarter of Britain's current generating capacity is scheduled to go offline by 2016, creating a shortfall described by the committee as a "generation gap" which could not be bridged by nuclear energy.
ref: Sementara itu hampir satu perempat kapasiti penjanaan semasa Britain dijadualkan akan di luar talian sebelum tahun 2016, mewujudkan kekurangan yang digambarkan oleh jawatankuasa itu sebagai "jurang generasi" yang tidak boleh dikurangkan oleh tenaga nuklear.

src: "Very substantial investment in new generating capacity and energy efficiency will be required if the lights are to stay on," committee chairman Conservative MP Tim Yeo said.
ref: "Pelaburan sangat besar dalam penjanaan kapasiti baru dan kecekapan tenaga akan diperlukan supaya lampu terus bernyala," kata Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Konservatif Ahli Parlimen Tim Yeo.

src: The committee stated that an "extensive" building programme of new gas-fired power stations would be needed to meet the predicted shortfall.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu menyatakan bahawa "banyak" program pembinaan stesen tenaga gas baru akan diperlukan untuk memenuhi kekurangan yang diramal.

src: The committee's statement drew some support from environmentalists as well as from some energy sector industries.
ref: Kenyataan jawatankuasa itu mendapat sokongan daripada pencinta alam sekitar dan juga dari beberapa industri sektor tenaga.

src: Friends of the Earth was cautiously cheered by the committee's commitment to energy efficiency, and support of reduced emissions.
ref: Friends of the Earth telah berhati-hati bersorak dengan komitmen jawatankuasa untuk kecekapan tenaga, dan sokongan pelepasan dikurangkan.

src: "...people understand renewables is the next big thing and we should get on with it," said Maf Smith, CEO of Scottish Renewables to BBC.
ref: "...orang ramai memahami tenaga boleh diperbaharui adalah perkara penting akan datang dan kita harus meneruskannya," kata Maf Smith, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Tenaga Boleh Diperbaharui Scotland kepada BBC.

src: On Friday, May 27, 2005, 9 trains on the New York City Subway will make their final run, ending rush-hour skip-stop service on the IRT Broadway-Seventh Avenue Line north of 137th Street-City College.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, 27 Mei, 2005, 9 kereta api kereta api bawah tanah New York City akan bergerak untuk kali terakhir, mengakhiri perkhidmatan waktu sibuk dan pemberhentian di stesen tertentu di IRT Broadway - Seventh Avenue Line utara 137th Street-City College.

src: During rush hours, the 9 is a skip-stop supplement to the 1, running the same route but skipping some stops in Upper Manhattan and the Bronx.
ref: Semasa waktu puncak, 9 adalah tambahan perkhidmatan pemberhentian di stesen tertentu untuk 1, berjalan laluan yang sama tetapi melangkau beberapa perhentian di Upper Manhattan dan Bronx.

src: At the same time, the 1 skips other stops, which are only served by the 9 at rush hours; some stops are served by all trains.
ref: Pada masa yang sama, 1 melangkau hentian lain, yang hanya boleh sampai dengan menggunakan 9 pada waktu sibuk; beberapa hentian boleh sampai dengan menggunakan semua kereta api.

src: This service pattern results in slightly faster trains, but longer waits for those going to or from skipped stations.
ref: Corak perkhidmatan in menghasilkan kereta api yang lebih cepat sedikit, tetapi waktu menunggu yang lebih lama untuk mereka yang pergi ke atau dari stesen dilangkau.

src: 9 service was started on December 12, 1988, at first running during rush hours and middays.
ref: Perkhidmatan 9 telah dimulakan pada 12 Disember 1988, pada mulanya berjalan pada waktu sibuk dan tengah hari.

src: The government has announced 13 June as the date for the upcoming Mount Albert by-election.
ref: Kerajaan telah mengumumkan 13 Jun sebagai tarikh untuk pilihan raya kecil Gunung Albert akan datang.

src: The by-election has been caused by former Prime Minister Helen Clark's departure to head the United Nations Development Program.
ref: Pilihan raya kecil telah disebabkan oleh pemergian bekas Perdana Menteri Helen Clark untuk mengetuai Program Pembangunan Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa.

src: While it is considered to be a safe Labour seat, the by-election is expected to be heavily contested.
ref: Walaupun ia dianggap sebagai kerusi Buruh yang selamat, pilihan raya kecil dijangka akan banyak yang dipertandingkan.

src: So far four candidates have put their names forward: Auckland city councillor Glenda Fryer, former candidate Hamish McCracken, University of Auckland political studies lecturer Meg Bates and employment lawyer Helen White.
ref: Setakat ini empat calon telah meletakkan nama mereka ke hadapan: ahli majlis bandar Auckland Glenda Fryer, bekas calon Hamish McCracken, pensyarah kajian politik Universiti Auckland Meg Bates dan peguam pekerjaan Helen White.

src: List MP Phil Twyford, widely expected to succeed Ms Clark, has not put his name forward.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Phil Twyford, yang dijangka menggantikan Cik Clark, tidak meletakkan namanya ke hadapan.

src: The National Party has narrowed its possible candidates down to two: list MP Melissa Lee or unsuccessful 2008 candidate Ravi Musuku.
ref: Parti Kebangsaan telah mengurangkan calon kepada dua orang: Ahli Parlimen Melissa Lee atau calon yang tidak berjaya pada tahun 2008 Ravi Musuku.

src: The decision will be made at a party meeting on 4 May.
ref: Keputusan akan dibuat dalam mesyuarat parti pada 4 Mei.

src: The Greens and ACT New Zealand will both contest the by-election, but have yet to select candidates.
ref: The Greens dan ACT New Zealand kedua-duanya akan bertanding dalam pilihan raya kecil, tetapi masih belum memilih calon.

src: Iran's Minister of Justice Gholam-Hossein Elham has requested that Dutch politician Geert Wilders' Qur'an film named Fitna should be prohibited by the Dutch government, Iranian press-agency IRNA reports.
ref: Menteri Keadilan Iran Gholam-Hossein Elham telah meminta agar filem ahli politik Belanda Geert Wilders agar filem berasaskan Quran bernama Fitna diharamkan oleh kerajaan Belanda, agensi akhbar Iran IRNA melaporkan.

src: Elham wrote a letter to his Dutch colleague Ernst Hirsch Ballin stating that: "you can stop the process of this satanic and conspiracy movement based on the European Convention on Human Rights".
ref: Elham menulis surat kepada rakan sejawatnya di Belanda Ernst Hirsch Ballin menyatakan bahawa: "anda boleh menghentikan perbuatan jahat dan pergerakan berkonspirasi ini berdasarkan Konvensyen Eropah mengenai Hak Asasi Manusia."

src: Freedom of speech cannot be the reason to allow this film, they say.
ref: Kebebasan bersuara tidak boleh dijadikan sebab untuk membenarkan filem ini, kata mereka.

src: "We also respect freedom of speech, but the insult of holy and ethical values is totally unacceptable," Elham writes.
ref: "Kami juga menghormati kebebasan bersuara, tetapi menghina kesucian dan nilai etika sama sekali tidak boleh diterima," Elham menulis.

src: "The rights of Muslims all over the world are violated by this blaspheming movie."
ref: "Hak-hak umat Islam di seluruh dunia sedang dilanggar oleh filem yang mendorong kepada kekufuran ini."

src: The Qur'an is the holy book for some 1.5 billion Muslims worldwide.
ref: Al-Quran adalah kitab suci untuk kira-kira 1.5 bilion umat Islam di seluruh dunia.

src: Wilders announced his "shocking" movie to be ready in March 2008.
ref: Wilders mengumumkan filem beliau yang "mengejutkan" ini akan siap pada Mac 2008.

src: At approximately 00:26 hrs, on Wednesday, March 22, the British Columbia ferry MV Queen of the North hit a rock near Gil Island in Wright Sound, off the coast of British Columbia, Canada, 75 from the start of ship's scheduled journey from Prince Rupert to Port Hardy on the Northern tip of Vancouver Island.
ref: Pada kira-kira jam 00:26, pada hari Rabu, 22 Mac, British Columbia feri MV Queen of the North terlanggar batu berhampiran Pulau Gil di Wright Sound, di luar pantai British Columbia, Kanada, 75 dari permulaan perjalanan dijadualkan kapal dari Prince Rupert ke Port Hardy di hujung utara Pulau Vancouver.

src: The ship missed a course change and ran agroung off Gil Island.
ref: Kapal itu terlepas perubahan haluan dan tersasar ke luar Pulau Gil.

src: It took about an hour for the ferry to sink, giving passengers time to get out.
ref: Ia mengambil masa kira-kira sejam untuk feri tenggelam, memberi masa penumpang untuk keluar.

src: The vessel was carrying 101 passengers and crew, and all but 2 were accounted for.
ref: Kapal itu membawa 101 penumpang dan anak kapal dan semua tetapi 2 sahaja telah diambil kira.

src: Thanks to quick-response of nearby aboriginal fishing villager of Hartley Bay, and the CCGS Sir Wiflrid Laurier.
ref: Mujurlah tindak balas penduduk orang asli kampung memancing berdekatan Hartley Bay, dan CCGs Sir Wiflrid Laurier.

src: Survivors were quickly fetched from the Queen of the North's lifeboat and brought to Hartley Bay and onboard the coast Guard ship, and eventually back to Prince Rupert onboard the Sir Wilfrid Laurier.
ref: Mangsa pantas diambil dari Ratu bot penyelamat Utara dan dibawa ke Hartley Bay dan menaiki kapal pengawal pantai, dan akhirnya kembali ke Prince Rupert menaiki Sir Wilfrid Laurier.

src: The Queen of the North, is (apx) 9,000 gross ton, motor driven vessel, built in Germany in 1969.
ref: The Queen of the North, (kira-kira) 9,000 tan kasar, kapal motor yang dipandu, dibina di Jerman pada tahun 1969.

src: The Queen of the North had been on this 15 hrs, 274 nautical mile ferry run since late May 1980.
ref: Queen of North telah berada di sini 15 jam, feri berjalan 274 batu nautika sejak akhir bulan Mei 1980.

src: In the summer and on relief work, her smaller sister ship, the Queen of Prince Rupert also performs that run.
ref: Pada musim panas dan kerja-kerja bantuan, kapal yang lebih kecil, Ratu Prince Rupert juga melakukan perjalanan itu.

src: President Xanana Gusmão has taken special security powers in a bid to quell the violence raging in East Timor.
ref: Presiden Xanana Gusmao mengambil kuasa keselamatan istimewa dalam usaha untuk memadamkan keganasan amuk di Timor Timur.

src: The period of emergency rule, which would last 30 days, was imposed to "prevent violence and avoid further fatalities" and lead to "rapid reestablishment of public order."
ref: Dalam tempoh pemerintahan darurat, yang mana akan kekal selama 30 hari, dikenakan untuk "menghalang keganasan dan mengelakkan lebih banyak kematian" dan membawa kepada "penubuhan semula segera ketenteraman awam."

src: At least 27 people have been killed, criminal documents reported stolen, and looting widespread in the East Timorese capital, Dili during the present period of unrest.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 27 orang telah terbunuh, dokumen-dokumen laporan jenayah telah dicuri, dan rompakan berleluasa di pusat Timorese Timur, Dili ketika tempoh masa pergolakan sekarang.

src: The Australian military commander in East Timor, Brigadier Michael Slater has called the mobs "gutless thugs."
ref: Komander tentera Australia di Timor Timur, Brigadier Michael Slater telah memanggil para perusuh sebagai "samseng tidak berisi perut."

src: Mr Alkatiri was unable to stop the rioting that followed the government's decision in March to lay-off 600 soldiers when they refused to work, complaining of discrimination.
ref: Mr Alkatiri tidak dapat menghentikan rusuhan berikutan keputusan kerajaan pada Mac lalu untuk memberhentikan 600 tentera apabila mereka menolak untuk bekerja, mengadu mengenai pendiskriminasian.

src: As the disorder grew during April and May, East Timor appealed for international assistance.
ref: Gangguan merebak pada April dan May, Timor Timur ke hadapan bagi merayu untuk bantuan antarabangsa.

src: Justice Minister Domingos Sarmento said that Portugal had offered to provide East Timor with 120 security personnel by the weekend.
ref: Menteri Kehakiman Domingos Sarmento berkata bahawa Portugal telah menawarkan untuk membekalkan Timor Timur dengan 120 anggota keselamatan pada hujung minggu ini.

src: The Pentagon has confirmed that US forces began an on-going operation of airstrikes in southern Somalia on Monday, and that the attacks, targeted at Islamic militia, are continuing.
ref: Pentagon telah mengesahkan bahawa tentera AS telah memulakan sebuah operasi serangan udara berterusan di selatan Somalia pada hari Isnin, dan serangan itu, disasarkan kepada militia Islam, sedang berterusan.

src: Somalia's president had earlier said that the United States was pursuing suspects of the 1998 United States embassy bombings.
ref: Presiden Somalia telah terlebih dahulu berkata bahawa Amerika Syarikat telah memburu orang-orang yang disyaki dari pengeboman kedutaan Amerika Syarikat 1998.

src: It is believed that the militants are sheltering the suspects.
ref: Ia dipercayai bahawa pihak militan sedang menyembunyikan orang-orang yang disyaki.

src: An attack against Ras Kamboni — a remote island near the Kenyan border, represents the first American involvement in the tumultuous country since the the 1993 operation that resulted in the deaths of as many as 1,500 Somali militiamen and civilians.
ref: Sebuah serangan terhadap Ras Kamboni - sebuah pulau terpencil berdekatan sempadan Kenya, mewakili penglibatan Amerika yang pertama di dalam negara yang huru-hara itu sejak operasi 1993 yang menyebabkan kematian sebanyak 1,500 orang anggota militia dan orang awam.

src: A Somali Defence Ministry official has additionally reported that American helicopters launched an attack against ICU fighters in Afmadow, a city near the Kenyan border, 350 kilometres southwest of Mogadishu.
ref: Seorang pegawai Kementerian Pertahanan Somali telah menambah laporan bahawa helikopter Amerika melancarkan serangan terhadap pejuang ICU di Afmadow, sebuah bandar berdekatan sempadan Kenya 350 kilometer barat daya Mogadishu.

src: The AC-130 gunship attack killed an unknown number of civilians, alternatingly reported as 4, 19 or 31.
ref: Serangan gunship AC-130 membunuh orang awam dengan jumlah yang tidak dapat dikenalpasti, secara bersilih ganti dilaporkan sebagai 4, 19 atau 31.

src: A circus elephant managed to escape from her handler on Sunday night in the city of Zurich, Switzerland before being recaptured by local police and circus animal keepers.
ref: Seekor gajah sarkas telah berjaya melarikan diri dari jurulatihnya pada malam hari Ahad di bandar Zurich, Switzerland sebelum ditangkap semula oleh polis tempatan dan penjaga haiwan sarkas.

src: The 26-year-old female elephant, named Sabu, is from Switzerland's Zirkus Knie.
ref: Gajah betina berusia 26 tahun itu, yang dinamakan Sabu, ialah dari Zirkus Knie Switzerland.

src: She was able to make her escape just before being put into a trailer, while the keeper was not paying attention.
ref: Ia mampu melarikan diri sejurus sebelum dimasukkan ke dalam treler, ketika penjaga tidak memberi perhatian kepadanya.

src: Around 1930 local time (1730 UTC), Sabu was seen wading in Lake Zurich for a short time before walking back onto city streets.
ref: Sekitar 1930 waktu tempatan (1730 UTC), Sabu telah dilihat mengharungi Tasik Zurich untuk masa yang seketika sebelum berjalan kembali ke jalan bandar.

src: Zurich police said that Sabu wandered along the Bahnhofstrasse avenue of Zurich, which is known as the city's most exclusive shopping street.
ref: Polis Zurich berkata yang Sabu telah merayau-rayau di sepanjang lebuh Bahnhofstrasse di Zurich, yang dikenali sebagai pusat membeli-belah paling ekslusif di bandar itu.

src: She also passed by Zürich Hauptbahnhof (the city's main rail station) and Paradeplatz, a square of Bahnhofstrasse, where both Credit Suisse Group AG and UBS AG have headquarters.
ref: Ia turut melalui Zurich Hauptbahnhof (stesen kereta api utama bandar tersebut) dan Paradeplatz, sebuah medan di Bahnhofstrasse, di mana ada ibu pejabat kedua-dua kumpulan Kredit Suisse AG dan UBS AG.

src: For nearly an hour, police chased the elephant around the city before she was finally peacefully recaptured in the Talstrasse section of Zurich.
ref: Untuk hampir dua jam, polis telah mengejar gajah itu di sekitar bandar tersebut sebelum ia akhirnya ditangkap semula secara aman di seksyen Talstrasse di Zurich.

src: Circus officials and police followed Sabu, but a circus spokesperson said that she did not respond to their calls.
ref: Para pengawai sarkas dan polis telah mengikut Sabu, tetapi seorang jurucakap sarkas berkata yang ia tidak memberi respon kepada panggilan mereka.

src: Sabu was also said to have been moving so fast that police had difficulty keeping up with her.
ref: Sabu turut dikatakan bergerak dengan amat pantas sehingga polis mempunyai kesusahan menghampirinya.

src: At about 2000 local time (1900 UTC), a keeper was able to control the animal and load her onto a truck to take her to Winterthur, where the other circus animals were.
ref: Di sekitar jam 2000 waktu tempatan (1900 UTC), seorang penjaga telah berjaya mengawal haiwan tersebut dan memasukkannya ke dalam trak untuk membawanya ke Winterthur, di mana haiwan sarkas lain berada.

src: There were no reports of any damage or injuries during the incident, and although police held back onlookers, at least one bystander managed to capture video of the event.
ref: Tidak ada laporan sebarang kerosakan atau kecederaan semasa kejadian itu, dan walaupun polis menahan orang ramai yang melihat, sekurang-kurangnya seorang yang berada di tempat kejadian berjaya merakam video kejadian itu.

src: The circus said that Sabu may have escaped after being frightened by storms near Zurich.
ref: Pihak sarkas berkata yang Sabu mungkin telah melarikan diri setelah ditakutkan oleh ribut berdekatan Zurich.

src: After returning to the circus, she was said to be tired, but "pleased to be back."
ref: Selepas kembali ke sarkas, ia dikatakan dalam kepenatan, tetapi "gembira untuk kembali."

src: Welsh poet Dannie Abse (81) and his wife Joan (78) were involved in a car crash while driving from Golders Green to their holiday home in Ogmore-by-Sea, South Wales.
ref: Pemuisi Welsh Dannie Abse (81) dan isterinya Joan (78) telah terlibat di dalam satu kemalangan kereta semasa memandu dari Golders Green ke rumah percutian mereka di Ogmore-di tepi Laut, South Wales.

src: Mrs. Abse died instantly; Mr Abse suffered a broken rib.
ref: Puan Abse meninggal dunia dengan serta-merta; En. Abse mengalami tulang rusuk patah.

src: The couple was returning from a poetry reading that they both had given.
ref: Pasangan itu sedang pulang dari bacaan puisi yang diberikan mereka.

src: Dannie Abse is an esteemed Jewish writer who lives in Glamorgan, South Wales.
ref: Dannie Abse ialah seorang penulis Yahudi terhormat yang tinggal di Glamorgan, South Wales.

src: Joan Abse, his wife, was an art historian and writer.
ref: Joan Abse, isterinya, merupakan seorang ahli sejarah seni dan penulis.

src: Dannie Abse is well-known for being a poet and a medical doctor.
ref: Dannie Abse dikenali sebagai seorang pemuisi dan seorang doktor perubatan.

src: Abse, in fact, was a specialist at a chest clinic for over thirty years.
ref: Abse, sebenarnya, seorang pakar di klinik dada untuk lebih tiga puluh tahun.

src: But Abse is best known for his writings and has received numerous literary awards and fellowships.
ref: Tetapi Abse paling dikenali untuk tulisannya dan telah menerima banyak anugerah sastera dan kedoktoran.

src: In 1989, he received an honorary doctorate from the Universities of Wales.
ref: Pada tahun 1989, dia telah menerima ijazah kedoktoran dari Universiti Wales.

src: The couple worked together editing two books in the 1980s.
ref: Pasangan itu telah berkerja bersama semasa menyunting dua buah buku pada 1980an.

src: Joan Abse leaves behind her husband, a son, and two daughters.
ref: Joan Abse meninggalkan suaminya, seorang anak lelaki, dan dua orang anak perempuan.
